fields.name: productionHostname
fields.whyRequired: ASP.NET Core / IIS must be bound to a resolvable production host; certificates and Entra redirect URIs are issued against this name.
fields.expectedSuccessfulOutput: A/AAAA record resolves to the production host's internal IP with no NXDOMAIN.

fields.name: osEdition
fields.whyRequired: Hosting model (in-process ANCM) and .NET 10 runtime support require a supported Windows Server edition.
fields.expectedSuccessfulOutput: OsName reports a supported Windows Server edition and a build matching the operator baseline.

fields.name: serviceAdminAccount
fields.whyRequired: The IIS application pool runs under a managed service account with rights to the SQL Server database and the Data Protection key ring only.
fields.expectedSuccessfulOutput: Account is a member only of the expected least-privilege groups; not a local administrator.

fields.name: iisFeatureState
fields.exampleValue: Web-Server, Web-Asp-Net45, Web-Net-Ext45, Web-Mgmt-Console = Installed; ASP.NET Core Hosting Bundle = Installed (version placeholder)
fields.whyRequired: The ASP.NET Core Module v2 (ANCM) and the Hosting Bundle must be present for in-process hosting under IIS.
fields.validationCommand: Get-WindowsFeature Web-Server, Web-Asp-Net45; (Get-Command dotnet).Path; reg query "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\IIS Extensions\Application Initialization"
fields.expectedSuccessfulOutput: Web-Server feature Installed; ASP.NET Core Module v2 appears in the IIS modules list; Hosting Bundle version >= app target.
